nasb.text: Moses entered the midst of the cloud as he went up to the mountain; and Moses was on the mountain forty days and forty nights.

esv.text: Moses entered the cloud and went up on the mountain. And Moses was on the mountain forty days and forty nights.

cnv.text: 摩西進入雲彩中，上到山上去；摩西在山上四十晝夜。

ccb.text: 摩西上到山上，走进云中，在那里停留了四十昼夜。
